testcase.name: test_reconciliation_endpoint_accepts_categoria_id
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_reconciliation_category.py:133: in test_reconciliation_endpoint_accepts_categoria_id assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Reconciliation failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Reconciliation failed: {"detail":"Este CFDI ya está completamente pagado. No hay saldo pendiente."} E assert 400 in [200, 201] E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_reconciliation_without_category_validation
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_reconciliation_category.py:210: in test_reconciliation_without_category_validation assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Reconciliation should succeed even without category: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Reconciliation should succeed even without category: {"detail":"Este CFDI ya está completamente pagado. No hay saldo pendiente."} E assert 400 in [200, 201] E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_payment_created_with_category_from_reconciliation
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_reconciliation_category.py:275: in test_payment_created_with_category_from_reconciliation assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Reconciliation failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Reconciliation failed: {"detail":"Este CFDI ya está completamente pagado. No hay saldo pendiente."} E assert 400 in [200, 201] E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
